body:
Before midnight, I need to build a grassroots movement that can fight back | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4minZTkyVS0vY7ZcsJXhhK8I-luQGOvy8mgA2SYufkTpW2Xxnde8OE0XtqrRtS_kpJmCJXm8yNH0F1OLBO_LHRg2NEFhKu0WNR7QlnI1U4GO9wSw_RS__6cEBhjyVUDh50jgDI4fmRHtJzuP6yspTpimV4VLEEr-nkzv1FZ8R_clhPq2l_bpPA29gEwfOmZrcbuLs1uhi8FGOaCzc12en8b0weOoP0mLj0zxhXiMNLsrTcZmWlw4_lh2RCIDXEmg5a-_LbTvfjMHxRhZfHy-W2F7-8-rQWdz08op-06Zi04r-M/3dp/TTI37xYiTsuunJiv7iJ8Rg/h0/LNLAZ59dOGElP3ONW2liGBfPuLwg_1mYghg8l3LwVlk)
There’s a reason we fought tooth and nail in 2017 and 2019 to take a majority in the House of Delegates -- it allowed us to pass landmark legislation like the Virginia Voting Rights Act, ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, legalize marijuana, create commonsense gun safety laws, and remove antiquated racist and homophobic laws from the books. Virginia Democrats have a proven track record of leadership, progressive values, and the ability to get things done in Richmond -- **[and we’re asking for your support to help us keep leading Virginia forward.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4minZTkyVS0vY7ZcsJXhhK8I-luQGOvy8mgA2SYufkTpW0bQzgq-kJczTJXUbjD7gZZRwZIWcH3KlxXvoVCsVBF2_lkXlhBt3Gkxx5djXUbo0HWxNm-c5J9g0L6TA0pUBETdhDegsWNanOzK4zdhaPU5ny1u2j2IjcewVrK6QnUrM3sqv9Eub3dkp07hahCcWZmBExKbk9tjKeTvjRiWSKTGfTyUjgxNslDnnY4biC0ape0MP8HRR-ziQqZlDrc1UZWYtzRNpG0CJzFBeIJMwEZmhD_bHZBfvQ2z2VTc14saGo/3dp/TTI37xYiTsuunJiv7iJ8Rg/h1/ufKeKwAUFcVDx8t4tluwzGX_8wdgqrD0ScZidNgvlMs)** When Democrats win, good things happen. When Republicans have control, our Commonwealth takes a giant step backward. Republicans in the House have made it clear that they won’t hesitate to pass laws that will restrict voting rights, limit access to reproductive health care, and roll back all of the progress we’ve made. They want to follow Donald Trump’s playbook of dog-whistle politics and regressive policies. **** [**If you want to see our Commonwealth move forward, please split a donation between the Democratic Party of Virginia and Common Good today.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4minZTkyVS0vY7ZcsJXhhK8I-luQGOvy8mgA2SYufkTpW2RpC3BhTr7rtitYi-22Mwtd6oUofajf5z2NNiLISDYk1hFyRNjIzPIFZTLU7KVrZ2Lp8QpV9bfK6ralzxPu5Vr9RAGHk9H8Y9PXn2gzPuHKWUGYsTCwjPT1DODdvNZMG9uma1ufRpabKmfTyTHiWJqlXOKpvnidIvH8JpCCXeDRpH3OJoeQk4QsXk_tpEhQ1BzTiMnaWbIzFLC25S3gXQVQl_92t81C7m3TcpT2gbXm8xTfLu7sCyCVFK1gUsX3w8/3dp/TTI37xYiTsuunJiv7iJ8Rg/h2/wyg6i0gCzjeecTc18kLKq8lPvTNDkyJhwxCDvN4w5So) Andrew

name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: What the California dream USED to be, Peter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957880:JlI0FMlNZ:m:1:3253819041:FC160F5659D89DC096296D5B0DDEF03A:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957880:JlI0FMlNZ:m:1:3253819041:FC160F5659D89DC096296D5B0DDEF03A:r)

body:
Have you caught this breaking news from... I [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c203%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=f%2bOTGXwlFUsO9vvlI3btXQ&sysid=1)

|
---
Hi friend, I’m Walt Blackman, I’m a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I’m running for Congress in Arizona’s 1st Congressional District.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4194%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ThmySfkgyDxGSO7hkDG4Lw&sysid=1)

I’m bringing this story from _the Daily Wire_ to the attention of every conservative and patriotic American.

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4105%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4AdfE0Y4zJG5C8MQ3y7%2boA&sysid=1)
This is very disturbing news, friend. Teacher unions are holding our schools, teachers, and children hostage with this dangerous ideology.

If you’re not sure what Critical Race Theory is and why is it so bad for America’s children, I’ll do a quick rundown:

**→ It teaches only the bad in American history, never the good. **
**→ It tries to sow division of Americans by race, just as Marxism divided by class. **
**→ It indoctrinates our children with anti-American propaganda. **
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4106%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vxrUxv5Dtaudgn6ioytm6w&sysid=1)
Critical Race Theory is a way for the radical Left to brainwash our children and fill their heads with their radical agenda. _**Plain and simple.**_

**[If you agree, then rush $5 right now toward my effort to Defeat Critical Race Theory >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4107%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iDmGXn8VK8JtTHV4pPS2SA&sysid=1)**
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4106%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vxrUxv5Dtaudgn6ioytm6w&sysid=1)
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world’s most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don’t believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don’t believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4194%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ThmySfkgyDxGSO7hkDG4Lw&sysid=1)

I’m running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I’ve served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2600500](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4108%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PY00lfpvuF1zOzWdUzPMNg&sysid=1)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
|

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I want to address the elephant in the room
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I’m not the typical candidate for U.S. Senate.
#

Friend,
This is going to be a long email but I'm hoping you'll read it. Because I want to address the elephant in the room.
I’m not the typical candidate for U.S. Senate.
I’m traversing a path that's never been taken, to serve from a place that never envisioned including a person like me. A place still rarely sees folks like us.
That means this ain’t easy.
I know I say this a lot, but it’s so important to have actual working people in government. I grew up a poor Black gay kid in Philly.
I don’t come from generational wealth — in fact, my mom had to ration her insulin, and my family moved a lot to avoid eviction.
But here’s the thing:
My story is not unique at all. Everywhere I go in Pennsylvania, I hear stories of good, hard-working people struggling to make ends meet.
The crushing weight of student debt. The skyrocketing cost of childcare and senior care. Postponed doctor visits and unfulfilled prescriptions.
**I’m in this race because no one like me — like us — has ever had a seat at the table in the U.S. Senate.**
Pennsylvania has never sent a Black person to the Senate, let alone a gay Black man who grew up poor.
Working families have bloody feet from walking over the brokenness and inaction of our government. It’s time for us to be in the room where decisions about our lives are being made.
In Harrisburg, I’ve fought tirelessly for solutions to the problems working people face every day.
From legal aid to those facing evictions to mental health care for our kids to ensuring all of us can make our voices heard in elections, I’m centering our families in this fight.
It’s up to us to send working people to the U.S. Senate.
I didn’t study poverty in school or learn about it from an internship — I lived it.
I got my first job at age 12 because I had to. I ran for state rep because no one was listening to families like ours.
[And now I’m running for U.S. Senate for the same reason. But I can't get there alone. So if you can chip in even $5, or $10 bucks today it would mean the world to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32592400/296251122/-353695395?refcode2=2016cbd4-d8e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210718-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDE2Y2JkNC1kOGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eh_hdE1ICYLNC5Qvh3V4cjUkOlp5-oIZ2ZUxkwjiieI=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32592401/296251123/-353695395?refcode2=2016cbd4-d8e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210718-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDE2Y2JkNC1kOGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eh_hdE1ICYLNC5Qvh3V4cjUkOlp5-oIZ2ZUxkwjiieI=)**
That's because your donation will put us that much closer to delivering a government that works for working people.
**A government that works for US.**
Thanks for being a part of this campaign. I'm so grateful for everything you do.
All my best,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

name: Team Bass
subject: Trump on insurrectionists: "These were great people"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello -- Donald Trump **recently called the violent mob that breached the People 's House on January 6 _" peaceful"_ and _" great people."_**

People died and countless more were injured during and following the Capitol breach. On top of that, the sanctity of our democracy was threatened.

Karen's colleague, House Homeland Security Committee Chairman Bennie Thompson, is leading a full investigation into the attack. "We'll do this work as long as it takes," Chairman Thompson said -- _which is what the American people deserve_.

**[Karen won't rest until we know the full truth about the events leading up to and during the January 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol. If you support a full investigation into the insurrection, add your name next to Karen's now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/eYOyDorLo3qKdpK7nIz9QuiMlOU_fsuSuG2tcIT2EWM=/wjdDhkqoBUBUwx7yIsg6N4bZ4N2rc0-9TEwLN2J7_sc=?gpsid=39_132_19684&ms=em21_210712_trmp_adv_gq_act_j6_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210712_trmp_adv_gq_act_j6_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210712_trmp_adv_gq_act_j6_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

Trump can keep lying about what happened on January 6 and Republicans can keep shamelessly supporting him, but they don't get to rewrite history. Karen is determined to uncover the truth -- not for political gain or for a partisan agenda, but because the future of our democracy depends on it.

**[Trump's words are yet another attack on the truth, so we need your help showing that the American people aren't falling for his lies. Add your name next to Karen's to support the FULL investigation into the January 6 attack](https://act.myngp.com/el/eYOyDorLo3qKdpK7nIz9QuiMlOU_fsuSuG2tcIT2EWM=/wjdDhkqoBUBUwx7yIsg6N4bZ4N2rc0-9TEwLN2J7_sc=?gpsid=39_132_19684&ms=em21_210712_trmp_adv_gq_act_j6_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210712_trmp_adv_gq_act_j6_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210712_trmp_adv_gq_act_j6_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**.

name: Val Demings
subject: NH and FL are battleground states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Help me protect and expand on our Senate Majority | | |
---
Hi there, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. We're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling my race a top battleground race for the Senate. But this isn’t the only battleground race in 2022. Republicans are targeting Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire in an attempt to flip her seat red with one of Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidates. Winning these seats is critical to protecting our Senate majority, but the margins are slim. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race. And in 2016, Maggie won by only 1,017 votes (0.14 percentage points), making it one of the closest Senate races in history. It's clear that the scales could tip either way in swing states like Florida and New Hampshire. So I'll tell you the plain truth: **we cannot win without you.** If we’re going to protect and expand on our slim Democratic majority, we need to flip this seat here in Florida and defend Senator Hassan’s in New Hampshire. **[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Maggie’s. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to flip Florida blue, protect Maggie’s seat, and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32592736/296252845/358321064?refcode=e20210718_demings&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWE5ODI2ZS1kOWU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVxMKLDpXHMAEx86g9yS_kTaqL6fPs2xj__KzeWKvtw=)** Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. **[I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race and protect our Senate majority. clean_body: Help me protect and expand on our Senate Majority | | | Hi there, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. We're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling my race a top battleground race for the Senate. But this isn’t the only battleground race in 2022. Republicans are targeting Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire in an attempt to flip her seat red with one of Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidates. Winning these seats is critical to protecting our Senate majority, but the margins are slim. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race. And in 2016, Maggie won by only 1,017 votes (0.14 percentage points), making it one of the closest Senate races in history. It's clear that the scales could tip either way in swing states like Florida and New Hampshire. So I'll tell you the plain truth: we cannot win without you. If we’re going to protect and expand on our slim Democratic majority, we need to flip this seat here in Florida and defend Senator Hassan’s in New Hampshire. = Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine. The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. = In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at protecting and expanding our slim Senate majority – so here's what I'm counting on: = = From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you. Congresswoman Val Demings | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: What the California dream USED to be, Peter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958069:6RxJszlNY:m:1:3253819041:3905166684AD1B509362F9CFFDFF7214:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958069:6RxJszlNY:m:1:3253819041:3905166684AD1B509362F9CFFDFF7214:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958069:6RxJszlNY:m:1:3253819041:3905166684AD1B509362F9CFFDFF7214:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958069:6RxJszlNY:m:1:3253819041:3905166684AD1B509362F9CFFDFF7214:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958069:6RxJszlNY:m:1:3253819041:3905166684AD1B509362F9CFFDFF7214:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958069:6RxJszlNY:m:1:3253819041:3905166684AD1B509362F9CFFDFF7214:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958069:6RxJszlNY:m:1:3253819041:3905166684AD1B509362F9CFFDFF7214:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
---

**Take The Olympic Flag Poll Today 📊**
Dear Friend,

**Last week, I sent a poll asking fellow patriots if they think**** O****lympians should be removed from team USA if they openly disrespect the flag. **

But I didn’t hear back from you, Friend.

**[Will you take the poll now?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ef873df6b0ed4a09a67ad07b3d28b566&_e=1BehhzNEttyt9FdSOO20SWjex5-o-F8n8Sx73ZfiqG_rBhx7T1EjXwVBG_81DOQS4fIaQQhUM63VffTWuljtKSp3L53Z2y-IalqDp7ua26rBe5SHHLzdRMg_-Aa0GCHyGzufz0CiWw98z_dbPEpi8pXUbcFYskW8jH4TbcePMP4soWqszQD6BfBChXylGefk8jY8XwlLeWVadgUm6t_TpFHig6IGDnFUVALLcz87ZF2ImgbYe2JYYcwkb0gQeteMwh8fOjVke40bNLK5543tj4M_3CUV_3YwRGrYb71UfK8wGIk3kWB2or9ft39prAKY)**

As a member of Congress it’s important for me to hear how my fellow conservatives feel about national issues like this.

→ Do you think it’s important that athletes representing our country don’t embarrass us on the world stage?

→ Do you think these athletes should have some pride in representing our country?

→ Or do you think a symbol which represents freedom all over the world shouldn’t be disrespected in such a grotesque way?

Whatever the reason, it’d be great to hear back from you in the next hour before we collect all the submissions. The poll will take less than a minute but it’s impact will be huge.

But I didn’t hear back from you, Friend. As a member of Congress it’s important for me to hear how my fellow conservatives feel about national issues like this. → Do you think it’s important that athletes representing our country don’t embarrass us on the world stage? → Do you think these athletes should have some pride in representing our country? → Or do you think a symbol which represents freedom all over the world shouldn’t be disrespected in such a grotesque way? Whatever the reason, it’d be great to hear back from you in the next hour before we collect all the submissions. The poll will take less than a minute but it’s impact will be huge. So, what do you think? Thanks for having a say, Tim Burchett | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. | | Peter, Merrick Garland's Justice Department can only do so much to fend off the next insurrection. **Washington Post: U.S. seeks prison term for first felony defendant to be sentenced in Capitol breach, citing domestic terror threat** Source: **[Washington Post](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32598257/296276333/741123501?utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter&utm_campaign=wp_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0NTQ2MWNjLWVkZTctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U2ZEYQrxnEXTlpyzyMmdDs3XY7WHeKK51-cBKXleyvo=&emci=738f874a-5fe6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=445461cc-ede7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** **Washington Post: Man who dangled from Senate balcony pleads guilty in Capitol riots, will cooperate against others** Source: **[Washington Post](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32598258/296276334/1236057189?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0NTQ2MWNjLWVkZTctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U2ZEYQrxnEXTlpyzyMmdDs3XY7WHeKK51-cBKXleyvo=&emci=738f874a-5fe6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=445461cc-ede7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** The problem is that with so many seditionists, insurrectionist-apologists, and QAnon conspiracy theorists in the halls of Congress it will be nearly impossible for this Congress to find the full truth of January 6. | **[JUSTICE FOR JANUARY 6](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32598259/296276335/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210718_GEN_FDR_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0NTQ2MWNjLWVkZTctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U2ZEYQrxnEXTlpyzyMmdDs3XY7WHeKK51-cBKXleyvo=)**

The GOP's caucus of traitors are making baseless attacks against anyone running against them \-- but we're here to help. We're fighting back against the GOP's attempts to undermine our democracy, beating them at the ballot box and undoing the damage they have brought on our institutions. But this work will require more resources to keep up with the relentless campaigns that the GOP has deployed to stop us.

**[Peter, we know that you understand how critical this fight is for the future of our democracy, but unfortunately, too many Democrats think our democracy will repair itself on its own. In reality, we're facing down a historic election defeat in 2022. That is a nightmare scenario for our democracy \-- and it's gonna take our entire grassroots army fighting with us to make sure that NEVER happens.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32598260/296276336/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210718_GEN_FDR_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0NTQ2MWNjLWVkZTctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U2ZEYQrxnEXTlpyzyMmdDs3XY7WHeKK51-cBKXleyvo=)**

We're committed to defending our democracy from future GOP attacks and we're honored to have you with us in this fight.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

| | Derek,

Glenn Youngkin may say he’s a political outsider, but we already know what he does when he’s in charge... _and it should concern every Virginian._

The private equity firm he led made investments in companies that shipped over a thousand jobs overseas and bought real estate companies that then hiked up rents on tenants, forcing some of them to choose between paying rent and buying groceries or medicine.

If he landed in the governor’s office, there’s little doubt that Youngkin would do the same thing he did at the Carlyle Group: look out for the ultra wealthy like himself while hurting working families. We have to make sure we win in November, but this race is going to be close!

A new poll just released this week shows Glenn Youngkin trailing Terry McAuliffe by **less than 2%!** Youngkin has already pledged to spend $75 million of his own money to win this election, and it’s already having an impact.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32599574/296280504/-2023814932?refcode=20210718.2_TM_7BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWUwZmZmYy1mMWU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LpSNCMPh8OV6bb6AHBonTKUGGJjy3s-lynhOBkpgao=)

| | The news just broke: Youngkin is dropping out of this week’s debate. Folks, every gubernatorial candidate since 1985 has participated in this debate. It’s pathetic that Glenn doesn't have the courage to meet me on stage and talk about the issues. Recently, after months of hiding his real right-wing agenda from Virginia voters, a secret tape leaked where Glenn Youngkin admits he’ll ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood if elected. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Thank you Governor Huckabee!
body:
It's pretty rare that the "big guys" recognize my work.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/433IZk3xdJFbBssRg3JpIA/l22mr8927638Yb4kouaRseIAUQ)
Patriot,

It's pretty rare that the "big guys" recognize my work.

So when it happens, I'm very grateful.

Former Arkansas Governor Mike Huckabee recently discussed my work on his show, and it was seen by nearly half a million people!

[**Watch it here.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/433IZk3xdJFbBssRg3JpIA/l22mr8927638Yb4kouaRseIAUQ)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/433IZk3xdJFbBssRg3JpIA/l22mr8927638Yb4kouaRseIAUQ)
When I confronted my local Supervisor of Elections in Florida, Wendy Sartory Link, about her spending of "Zuckerbucks" it wasn't JUST about her.

**Governor Huckabee got that.**

The event where I ran into Mrs. Link, was masquerading as an official government meeting, however it was a private group propped up by voting machine companies like Dominion Software!

Improving voter confidence and integrity is vital as we head into the Mid-Term Elections and we have to be more vigilant than ever - that's why I had to be there to expose this deceptive meeting.

Now, on top of running and winning a Congressional campaign, ALL Republican candidates have to spend their time and money to protect the vote, because our elected officials across the country aren't doing enough to ensure election integrity.

[**Help me do that by donating to my campaign here**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/433IZk3xdJFbBssRg3JpIA/l22mr8927638Yb4kouaRseIAUQ), after you watch Governor Huckabee's segment of course.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

subject: they’re openly indoctrinating our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958160:6nzZ6zlN3:m:1:3253819041:D0EE243E4CD66A7942311C15F7FB3A43:r)
|
---
Hi Peter, I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958160:6nzZ6zlN3:m:1:3253819041:D0EE243E4CD66A7942311C15F7FB3A43:r)

I'm bringing this story from _the Daily Wire_ to the attention of every conservative and patriotic American.

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958160:6nzZ6zlN3:m:1:3253819041:D0EE243E4CD66A7942311C15F7FB3A43:r)
This is very disturbing news, Peter. Teacher unions are holding our schools, teachers, and children hostage with this dangerous ideology.

If you're not sure what Critical Race Theory is and why is it so bad for America's children, I'll do a quick rundown:

**-> It teaches only the bad in American history, never the good. **
**-> It tries to sow division of Americans by race, just as Marxism divided by class. **
**-> It indoctrinates our children with anti-American propaganda. **
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958160:6nzZ6zlN3:m:1:3253819041:D0EE243E4CD66A7942311C15F7FB3A43:r)
Critical Race Theory is a way for the radical Left to brainwash our children and fill their heads with their radical agenda. _**Plain and simple.**_

**[If you agree, then rush $5 right now toward my effort to Defeat Critical Race Theory >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958161:6nzZ6zlN3:m:1:3253819041:D0EE243E4CD66A7942311C15F7FB3A43:r)**
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958160:6nzZ6zlN3:m:1:3253819041:D0EE243E4CD66A7942311C15F7FB3A43:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958160:6nzZ6zlN3:m:1:3253819041:D0EE243E4CD66A7942311C15F7FB3A43:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2600500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958160:6nzZ6zlN3:m:1:3253819041:D0EE243E4CD66A7942311C15F7FB3A43:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
|
---

subject: CNN Breaking News

body:
#

**_Breaking News:_ CNN just labeled us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022**
_Chip in before midnight to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210718-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=964_6688874_OSQW_i&akid=964%2E6688874%2EOSQW_i)**
Friends — we won’t take up too much of your time, we promise.
[**Before the weekend is over, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210718-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=964_6688874_OSQW_i&akid=964%2E6688874%2EOSQW_i)
This month, CNN labeled us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. And to make things worse, Mark now has FOUR Republican opponents running to take back this seat, and the most recent opponent to jump in has a $10 million Super PAC backing his campaign.
So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to get comfortable. National Republicans think they can take back this seat in 2022, and the fact that so many Republicans have already jumped into the race means they are serious.
Mark needs our support to hold this seat and the best way we can do that is by making sure we have the resources to run another strong campaign and win a full six-year term to the Senate.
**Your support will go a long way, so please use the link below to make a donation today:**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/July-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210718-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=964_6688874_OSQW_i&akid=964%2E6688874%2EOSQW_i)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: The Nation’s Pilot Light: CPAC Speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
I think of my district as the nation’s pilot light. If it’s dark everywhere else, we’re the light that refuses to go out... | | |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

Last weekend I was honored to speak at CPAC’s summer conference. There, I saw a movement that is on fire and ready to fire Speaker Nancy Pelosi - a movement that is working tirelessly to take our country back from the brink of socialism.

I think of my district as the nation’s pilot light. If it’s dark everywhere else, we’re the light that refuses to go out. President Eisenhower, who hailed from Kansas' Big First, made that point at his first inauguration. He said that a people that values its **privilege** s above its **principles** soon loses both. I am working hard for our Kansas conservative principles and will do everything in my power to keep our pilot light burning bright.

You can watch the video of my speech here:

---
| [ ](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=45a293794c&e=a9d1410029)
---
|
Yours in the fight,
Tracey Mann

P.S. I will continue to stand for Kansas as we move forward and do everything in my power to ensure our kids have a bright future. _Please[(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=942e1cc856&e=a9d1410029) to donate today and help take our country back. _

name: Giffords.org
subject: Take our issue survey so we can turn your responses into meaningful action!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends,
We are more than halfway through 2021 and we have made a lot of progress this year, from passing background checks through the House to securing billions in federal funding for community-based violence prevention.
However, we want to stop for a moment and check in with our supporters (like you!) to make sure that our priorities are aligned heading into the back half of this year.
**The survey should only take 60 seconds to complete and we are hoping to get a lot of responses today, so we would especially love to hear from you!**
[**Please take a minute to complete our July Priorities Survey and let us know what your #1 issue is right now. We’ll get right to work analyzing the results so we can turn your responses into meaningful action.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/july_survey?source=em210718-1-15&t=1&akid=355%2E3935704%2EejU9hr)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/july_survey?source=em210718-1-15&t=2&akid=355%2E3935704%2EejU9hr)**
We’ve done a lot so far in 2021. Let’s make sure that we can keep up the good work and save even more lives.
We look forward to reading your responses!
Team Giffords
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/july_survey?source=em210718-1-15&t=3&akid=355%2E3935704%2EejU9hr)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=355%2E3935704%2EejU9hr) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: I’m feeling discouraged, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm feeling discouraged.

My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.

Marco Rubio

| As President Trump's Secretary of State, I was proud to lead the charge to protect religious freedom all around the globe. No one should be attacked by their government for simply living out their faith. Working alongside President Trump, we made great progress.

Unfortunately, our work is being undone by the Democrat majority in Washington. _In fact, religious freedom, especially for followers of Christ, is under increasing attack right here in the United States from our own government._

**[Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9be99ed77c20432188f47c8f7d694ff8&_e=nH_QBgQQ_tVBOGdViSO2xBX0_gB24bRgd4d0JF2duXTNFrtabh36on4w1GVcBmCYs2eyVjdI2v2FfEGm_cFVnfFKXSKufnoEifcgmhPKhdoeqqhlUI_o6bxf3yDv_RzA9FxHunOZsd5RxI91rlMFcPY44Ws4rcM9zNtj7nbgkAOu47wTOzdbfHOIPpQglTJjHq5ZWox-jbCy_D0qiepcEd4P5KvONdP2Bjd9t2-dKBfbjOxY5N7sdi8wHV7rgDbJ1YJK-RiW4DmyNRk9MymGOuOpqRtUGAoCtZCwJE22_8h0nKHCuzk1mE0Z7RHA6E8_Gt3d3VjOJ9s43mxU5dDiGPaIm5njiMi10hDLPXs96ncvbC11gPBKvg8xJsL3TUD70uRzvAxil21cvvMizjQydpN3AcaDNbYrg8_UyXsr3l1krqdW0uh6R3zmQwenXTvnARiZ81o2PeHm9I8Cm3Ep2wm0rgeXsIMrhr4PQ6DIVkt6fRLnT5kqEHZnW92hhLWM-fNEP_N8ZswomGDQLhvw_Q%3D%3D "Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?")**

The founding of our country is deeply rooted in Judeo-Christian values, and now Americans are being criticized and attacked for standing up for those very values. It is deeply troubling.

**Let 's be clear: no society can retain its legitimacy or a virtuous character without religious liberty.**

Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, **[I'm asking you to join me in showing the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9be99ed77c20432188f47c8f7d694ff8&_e=nH_QBgQQ_tVBOGdViSO2xBX0_gB24bRgd4d0JF2duXTNFrtabh36on4w1GVcBmCYs2eyVjdI2v2FfEGm_cFVnfFKXSKufnoEifcgmhPKhdoeqqhlUI_o6bxf3yDv_RzA9FxHunOZsd5RxI91rlMFcPY44Ws4rcM9zNtj7nbgkAOu47wTOzdbfHOIPpQglTJjHq5ZWox-jbCy_D0qiepcEd4P5KvONdP2Bjd9t2-dKBfbjOxY5N7sdi8wHV7rgDbJ1YJK-RiW4DmyNRk9MymGOuOpqRtUGAoCtZCwJE22_8h0nKHCuzk1mE0Z7RHA6E8_xVJE9VAS0sfFN8kaN5Swks1OEiEOKkjB20PTVSg_5nDx_GS6-KqeXtLuUVrzwa90khlch6d0lif32RRMDosdBp96wQ8PUVreteTt4TKJiGehlRsGeO2Vn5-I5neeOlM6LkIZy-k4o0-t3Z3rR6hl8ZSY5SjfgfQzagJE04loptnTp5GBMiLQkx5DS-Vjw-IAa0Oo-Zd9GUVRSt5CrYdbpw%3D%3D "I’m asking you to donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms.")**

It's going to take all of us working hard in our churches, our towns and in our missions across the world to promote religious freedom everywhere and always.

_Religious freedom is a fundamental American value, and it must be protected at all costs._

Fighting for our future,

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State, Trump Administration

This is of utmost importance. | ****
---
Fellow American,

It’s been a while since I last reached out, so you know I wouldn’t do it unless it was of the utmost importance.

Now more than ever, America needs the Republican Party to step up and lead our country in the right direction. **What we’re seeing from the Biden-Harris administration is an agenda so radical it is taking us beyond socialism to an agenda of** **national DECLINE,** **where nothing of our founding principles and values will remain.**

_The Trump-Pence administration built the strongest economy the country had ever seen, and now the Biden-Harris administration wants to demolish it._

I have no doubt that in 2022, the **American people will choose a future of freedom and American values** , and the Republican Party will lead the way, but only if we have YOUR support, Fellow American.

clean_body: This is of utmost importance. | ** Fellow American, It’s been a while since I last reached out, so you know I wouldn’t do it unless it was of the utmost importance. Now more than ever, America needs the Republican Party to step up and lead our country in the right direction. What we’re seeing from the Biden-Harris administration is an agenda so radical it is taking us beyond socialism to an agenda of national DECLINE, where nothing of our founding principles and values will remain. The Trump-Pence administration built the strongest economy the country had ever seen, and now the Biden-Harris administration wants to demolish it. I have no doubt that in 2022, the American people will choose a future of freedom and American values , and the Republican Party will lead the way, but only if we have YOUR support, Fellow American. Our End-of-Month fundraising deadline is fast approaching, and if we fall behind we may not be able to secure the victory we need in 2022. Can I count on you to step up and fight beside me? END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE PATRIOT: CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: IMMEDIATELY** Soon, the donor list with the names of every patriot who contributed to our End-of-Month goal will be updated. I hope we can add your name. name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: What the California dream USED to be, Peter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958244:654C1zlNk:m:1:3253819041:AF49A4E1FA65D9FCABE53E76795B121F:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958244:654C1zlNk:m:1:3253819041:AF49A4E1FA65D9FCABE53E76795B121F:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958244:654C1zlNk:m:1:3253819041:AF49A4E1FA65D9FCABE53E76795B121F:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958244:654C1zlNk:m:1:3253819041:AF49A4E1FA65D9FCABE53E76795B121F:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958244:654C1zlNk:m:1:3253819041:AF49A4E1FA65D9FCABE53E76795B121F:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958244:654C1zlNk:m:1:3253819041:AF49A4E1FA65D9FCABE53E76795B121F:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958244:654C1zlNk:m:1:3253819041:AF49A4E1FA65D9FCABE53E76795B121F:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
---

name: Josh Harder
subject: Rockin' out with MoBand 🥁
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HLWXqJBbuyQtfpIz0HtCdBnVAret-qtvAA_T5lNL5a8=/lrvF8Ibn1YX22EyW5-xvY27ZA1Ys5Zbx6MDQhsuRRJY=?refcode=E10234-20210716-WrapUp-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Peter, This summer is shaping up to be a great one in the Valley. I don't know about you, but Pam and I have turbocharged our events calendar - we've missed big community events so much! So I thought I'd share a glimpse into our Valley life by taking you through my past few days. First, I rocked out on the drums with MoBand, Modesto's 100 year old band. I'm not new to the scene though, I actually have played in the band since in high school! I like to think my skills have gotten a little bit better since then? [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HLWXqJBbuyQtfpIz0HtCdBnVAret-qtvAA_T5lNL5a8=/lrvF8Ibn1YX22EyW5-xvY27ZA1Ys5Zbx6MDQhsuRRJY=?refcode=E10234-20210716-WrapUp-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Next I got to kick off the big event of the County fair - the tractor pull - and let's just say I'm glad I packed my ear plugs. If you haven't been to a tractor pull before, it's absolutely a must-do, and Modesto's is one of the best in the country. Come visit! [**Will you please chip in to my campaign today so I can continue to represent our amazing community in Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HLWXqJBbuyQtfpIz0HtCdBnVAret-qtvAA_T5lNL5a8=/lrvF8Ibn1YX22EyW5-xvY27ZA1Ys5Zbx6MDQhsuRRJY=?refcode=E10234-20210716-WrapUp-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HLWXqJBbuyQtfpIz0HtCdBnVAret-qtvAA_T5lNL5a8=/lrvF8Ibn1YX22EyW5-xvY27ZA1Ys5Zbx6MDQhsuRRJY=?refcode=E10234-20210716-WrapUp-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) I also put on firefighter gear for an abbreviated firefighter training course. If you think it's hot in California, just wait until you experience 106 degrees while fighting fires! In all seriousness after this training, I feel even more grateful for our heroes on the frontlines battling an already dangerous wildfire season. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HLWXqJBbuyQtfpIz0HtCdBnVAret-qtvAA_T5lNL5a8=/lrvF8Ibn1YX22EyW5-xvY27ZA1Ys5Zbx6MDQhsuRRJY=?refcode=E10234-20210716-WrapUp-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Finally, what better way to spend a Sunday morning than with hundreds of little leaguers! There's nothing cuter than presenting a trophy to a 5 year old while her family cheers on. Congrats to all the kiddos on a great season! clean_body: | | Peter, This summer is shaping up to be a great one in the Valley. I don't know about you, but Pam and I have turbocharged our events calendar - we've missed big community events so much! So I thought I'd share a glimpse into our Valley life by taking you through my past few days. First, I rocked out on the drums with MoBand, Modesto's 100 year old band. I'm not new to the scene though, I actually have played in the band since in high school! I like to think my skills have gotten a little bit better since then? Next I got to kick off the big event of the County fair - the tractor pull - and let's just say I'm glad I packed my ear plugs. If you haven't been to a tractor pull before, it's absolutely a must-do, and Modesto's is one of the best in the country. Come visit! I also put on firefighter gear for an abbreviated firefighter training course. If you think it's hot in California, just wait until you experience 106 degrees while fighting fires! In all seriousness after this training, I feel even more grateful for our heroes on the frontlines battling an already dangerous wildfire season. Finally, what better way to spend a Sunday morning than with hundreds of little leaguers! There's nothing cuter than presenting a trophy to a 5 year old while her family cheers on. Congrats to all the kiddos on a great season! Folks, all of these events were possible thanks to the community members who have gotten vaccinated, helped the Valley re-open, and supported each other through challenging times. The hard work and perseverance of my neighbors is what inspires me to do the work I do, and I'm honored to represent such a vibrant community. Here's to a great rest of the summer! \-- Josh = =

On July 30th, 2021 we will be hosting a fundraiser with the Sheriff and his wife at the Dunafon Castle in Idledale, CO. VIP is a donation of $250 and General Admission is only $100! Get your tickets by clicking the image below. | == | | == Then, on July 31st, 2021 we will have a float in the Douglas County Fair Parade in Historic Downtown Castle Rock, CO. Join the Laurel Imer for Congress Team and Pinal County Arizona Sheriff, Mark Lamb, and his wife Janel as we walk in the parade with signs, American Flags, and much more. Wear your patriotic attire and celebrate Freedom with us! Reserve your space in the parade by clicking the image below. == | | == Thanks to your continued contributions, The Laurel Imer for Congress Campaign is able to host and attend events like these, and we can't Thank You enough! subject: Hi there, will you be a Founding Member of Charlie’s campaign?

body:
Being well funded in the early stages of a campaign is crucial
|
---

| | **Being well-funded in the early stages of a campaign is _crucial_ , friend.**

It means that when the race heats up during the home stretch, we're _prepared._

So we're coming to you with a simple but important ask:

****[Will you become a Founding Member of Charlie Crist's campaign for governor? ---
**Gov. Ron DeSantis has a steady flow of cash from Trump 's base of supporters and deep-pocketed Republican donors.** Charlie can only fight back with a _WAVE_ of grassroots support from folks like you.

**[Chip in today and become a Founding Member of Charlie's campaign for governor!](https://act.myngp.com/el/o22yW2wBhcAr_-cVXtZxEg==/pqudqBIRQOkC8kYJMG-UdA==?refcode=20210718_f_1_fl&amount=20)** **You 'll find the link to print your membership card on the receipt for your donation!**

clean_body: Get the facts, Peter. | For months, Republicans have been pushing for an audit of the 2020 Election. Democrats said we were crazy. But we knew better. Now, new evidence is emerging from Battleground Georgia (where both the Presidential and Senate Elections were decided) that thousands of votes were counted multiple times or counted “incorrectly.” | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: 3 Early Audit Results You Need to Know!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
News breaking constantly now |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7100e86d59&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear , Buckle your seatbelts- this is it, and the results are coming in from America’s Audit in Maricopa County in Arizona.
**My name is Mark Finchem. I’m the first guy who took a stand and said NO; I listened to you when so many others could not be bothered. I led a team of courageous legislators who joined me in the very first hearing that launched a nationwide phenomenon.**
*****JOIN THE MOVEMENT*****
As a state Representative who has been leading the charge for the Maricopa Audit from the beginning, it is my mission to make sure that every state has their election’s audited to see what REALLY happened in the 2020 election- and [I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=92cb924476&e=44b8c466b0)! And Georgia’s next...
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ee546470d3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Election integrity is the single most important thing to me. That is why I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona, to make sure that our elections are protected from the Democrats!_

**I have been writing you every week, telling you just to be patient, waiting for the reports to come out.**

Well....the time is up. The reports are starting to come out, and the results ain’t pretty.

**Don’t worry, there’s a lot more to come, but I want to get you started with three of the most important stories to watch...**

**__One...__**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e93b6c35e8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **After review, we know that there are 168,000 on demand ballots that are suspect. This makes it IMPOSSIBLE to call the election accurately, which means that Arizona should not have been declared for Biden – as we knew all along.**

The next step is simple. Audit the votes by canvassing – make sure these people actually exist! As a former criminal investigator, if I learned anything its this: Follow the evidence!

**__Two...__**
---
|
---
| I might not be a mathematician, but something doesn’t add up. 74,000 more ballots received than the ballots sent out! We need to examine and audit the USPS to find the root of this fraud.

**When you have more ballots mailed out than were asked for, and even MORE sent back, this is clearly a monumental problem.**

_Through our hard work and your support, we are literally catching the Democrats RED HANDED as we speak._

**And the fight is just beginning! We must win our bid for Secretary of State to make sure that Arizona elections are safe!**

[_Donate as much as you can to FINISH the fight, defend our elections, and help my campaign to win Secretary of State. Every dollar you donate goes to helping spread this message of Election integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a29d73293a&e=44b8c466b0)

**__Three...__**
---
|
---
| **How is it possible in “The most free and fair election of all time” that there were thousands of names added as voters after election day? **

_It’s simple. It’s not possible. The Democrats have been lying to America through the puppet of the Fake News Media!_

**And we have to stop them now. There is no choice. The Audit is under attack, and with that – if they succeed – the last hopes of stopping the Biden presidency and protecting our elections goes up in smoke.**

A big donation today sends a bigger message that you can’t mess with American freedoms and you can’t mess with American elections. We need to protect the integrity of the audit, of our elections, and of the freest nation on earth!

[**Can you help me?**

_Donate TODAY to send a message to the Democrats that we won’t back down!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=84c355512e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2ff98270dc&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e1f166294b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=4acad16854) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=4acad16854).

name: Mike Pence
subject: Can you step up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is of utmost importance. | ****
---
Peter,

It’s been a while since I last reached out, so you know I wouldn’t do it unless it was of the utmost importance.

Now more than ever, America needs the Republican Party to step up and lead our country in the right direction. **What we’re seeing from the Biden-Harris administration is an agenda so radical it is taking us beyond socialism to an agenda of** **national DECLINE,** **where nothing of our founding principles and values will remain.**

_The Trump-Pence administration built the strongest economy the country had ever seen, and now the Biden-Harris administration wants to demolish it._

I have no doubt that in 2022, the **American people will choose a future of freedom and American values** , and the Republican Party will lead the way, but only if we have YOUR support, Peter.

body:
| |
---
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958898:6SRVYzlNy:m:1:3253819041:B12E4AADB3E45493D6CBB4DECF74DA11:r)
|
---
Hi Peter, I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958898:6SRVYzlNy:m:1:3253819041:B12E4AADB3E45493D6CBB4DECF74DA11:r)

I'm bringing this story from _the Daily Wire_ to the attention of every conservative and patriotic American.

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958898:6SRVYzlNy:m:1:3253819041:B12E4AADB3E45493D6CBB4DECF74DA11:r)
This is very disturbing news, Peter. Teacher unions are holding our schools, teachers, and children hostage with this dangerous ideology.

If you're not sure what Critical Race Theory is and why is it so bad for America's children, I'll do a quick rundown:

**-> It teaches only the bad in American history, never the good. **
**-> It tries to sow division of Americans by race, just as Marxism divided by class. **
**-> It indoctrinates our children with anti-American propaganda. **
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958898:6SRVYzlNy:m:1:3253819041:B12E4AADB3E45493D6CBB4DECF74DA11:r)
Critical Race Theory is a way for the radical Left to brainwash our children and fill their heads with their radical agenda. _**Plain and simple.**_

**[If you agree, then rush $5 right now toward my effort to Defeat Critical Race Theory >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958899:6SRVYzlNy:m:1:3253819041:B12E4AADB3E45493D6CBB4DECF74DA11:r)**
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958898:6SRVYzlNy:m:1:3253819041:B12E4AADB3E45493D6CBB4DECF74DA11:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958898:6SRVYzlNy:m:1:3253819041:B12E4AADB3E45493D6CBB4DECF74DA11:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2600500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958898:6SRVYzlNy:m:1:3253819041:B12E4AADB3E45493D6CBB4DECF74DA11:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
|

| As President Trump's Secretary of State, I was proud to lead the charge to protect religious freedom all around the globe. No one should be attacked by their government for simply living out their faith. Working alongside President Trump, we made great progress.

Unfortunately, our work is being undone by the Democrat majority in Washington. _In fact, religious freedom, especially for followers of Christ, is under increasing attack right here in the United States from our own government._

**[Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c05de16303b740b3b3ae7b68c17d3e1b&_e=s8bJMyfF93w9-UX0PbPIrVzBfzXjLkSJCGHSH5PlTb6HDL6gP4d7Ka_LdVpppLQRZcXUHHzJZR443PCjRYi196Oz54T0-Ke7kjmmn6hIGbaaQJL64KRL7zJ9O4a5VoeaRxucWArogQG2CJ_nIO7WxGHdJ3ZTQ50tq2MpQq2DwBF--Av4A38L6r2_jma2yRnpdNuI3LscUbyq8RiOa05HrPY9RsQzSpfnAREDvJQd1ERERai7CpIQQiWv1e5bvLauq0bqvzebnKDv2Z-Cj60geHuEzWCh-sfQ1vxv6xDCVf2vD3cc21YcJbmGuenbMssyvHozB8vVq_PbAh2tYsRUoxoo1qFl9ukBDhPJrd7e8P7LzdT6wOQfR4krjpd4atMiorzFff8BJ87DQLAyzI1kdE7RFPCldBHkLRtOAj2BAa4iH0XLdz0j1qB0Ex2H7ZKSYwgz9XOFELkJk4KZkPkIOSBCq3Wpq8DtcSqcgwzBiqFX2U5-7ygYmektW1cCLCXxhmrY8pWwTZthhUevm3IM_A%3D%3D "Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?")**

The founding of our country is deeply rooted in Judeo-Christian values, and now Americans are being criticized and attacked for standing up for those very values. It is deeply troubling.

**Let 's be clear: no society can retain its legitimacy or a virtuous character without religious liberty.**

Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, **[I'm asking you to join me in showing the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c05de16303b740b3b3ae7b68c17d3e1b&_e=s8bJMyfF93w9-UX0PbPIrVzBfzXjLkSJCGHSH5PlTb6HDL6gP4d7Ka_LdVpppLQRZcXUHHzJZR443PCjRYi196Oz54T0-Ke7kjmmn6hIGbaaQJL64KRL7zJ9O4a5VoeaRxucWArogQG2CJ_nIO7WxGHdJ3ZTQ50tq2MpQq2DwBF--Av4A38L6r2_jma2yRnpdNuI3LscUbyq8RiOa05HrPY9RsQzSpfnAREDvJQd1ERERai7CpIQQiWv1e5bvLauq0bqvzebnKDv2Z-Cj60geHuEzWCh-sfQ1vxv6xDCVf2vD3cc21YcJbmGuenbMssyESDyzC_AySUuE6emHlqsfoUUBZ1fECX4ytBbdM6_1H8l0pRSw2NIhoMEzM4DhW9rqPhMldXXhFm4lYbm49KLEYRPbiNDuKzz-oZ18nCufs1vE8pmMHbpKdfCc7MVKXZGP4HkWJOXyyqnKSH7JG9JXojB4q9N-m3grznTIYwLjySB9-iTZxySJQnRr_G_BGSXsCzaycUwbGzwRFrodi8VyQ%3D%3D "I’m asking you to donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms.")**

_Religious freedom is a fundamental American value, and it must be protected at all costs._

Fighting for our future,

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State, Trump Administration

clean_body: | | | | | | As President Trump's Secretary of State, I was proud to lead the charge to protect religious freedom all around the globe. No one should be attacked by their government for simply living out their faith. Working alongside President Trump, we made great progress. Unfortunately, our work is being undone by the Democrat majority in Washington. In fact, religious freedom, especially for followers of Christ, is under increasing attack right here in the United States from our own government. "Will you support religious freedom here at home and around the world?" The founding of our country is deeply rooted in Judeo-Christian values, and now Americans are being criticized and attacked for standing up for those very values. It is deeply troubling. Let 's be clear: no society can retain its legitimacy or a virtuous character without religious liberty. Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, "I’m asking you to donate to show the mainstream media and the radical Left just how many Americans are opposed to these efforts to restrict our God-given rights and freedoms." | It's going to take all of us working hard in our churches, our towns and in our missions across the world to promote religious freedom everywhere and always. Religious freedom is a fundamental American value, and it must be protected at all costs. Fighting for our future, Mike Pompeo 70th Secretary of State, Trump Administration | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. PO BOX 2485 SPRINGFIELD, VA 22152 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Marco Rubio (personal)
subject: I’m feeling discouraged, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm feeling discouraged.

My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.
| **MISSING RESPONSE: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958924:JVmwbzlmN:m:1:3253819041:3E264B09674E4BB3EC4E538E882F09C0:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_

CORRECT THE RECORD HERE:**
| | [I STAND WITH RUBIO & TRUMP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958924:JVmwbzlmN:m:1:3253819041:3E264B09674E4BB3EC4E538E882F09C0:r "I STAND WITH RUBIO & TRUMP")
---

I really hate to reach out once again, but radical Democrat PACs are ALREADY raising MILLIONS of dollars to beat me and we're just starting...Peter, **_Fox News_ said this might be the most expensive Senate race EVER & _CNN_ bumped me higher on their list of seats they think are likely to flip.** If I fall behind again I might not ever catch up.

| | [I STAND WITH RUBIO & TRUMP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958924:JVmwbzlmN:m:1:3253819041:3E264B09674E4BB3EC4E538E882F09C0:r "I STAND WITH RUBIO & TRUMP")
---

If we don't win back the Senate, Chuck Schumer will pack the Supreme Court, pass sweeping gun control, get rid of the filibuster...the list goes on. The last Florida Senate race was decided by 0.01% & Roll Call listed my race as KEY for deciding control of the Senate. _**[I need you to take a stand with me, Peter, if I'm going to have any chance at winning this race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57958924:JVmwbzlmN:m:1:3253819041:3E264B09674E4BB3EC4E538E882F09C0:r "I need you to take a stand with me, Peter, if I’m going to have any chance at winning this race.")**_

Hope to see you on my list of supporters soon,

Marco Rubio

---
|

I wanted to make sure you saw my earlier message, folks. Last week, I officially introduced the _Zero-Emission Homes Act_ in the Senate. Electrifying America's homes is a surefire way to cut down on fossil fuels and take bold action on climate. We can’t put the financial burden of transitioning to electric appliances on hardworking people. We’ve got to make sure everyone in our country has access to the economic, environmental, and health benefits of electrification. This bill will make sure folks get rebates for the purchase and installation of zero-emission electric appliances and equipment. I am working hard to get it passed — but I’m hoping to have your support, too. [**Can you sign the petition to become a citizen co-sponsor of my _Zero-Emission Homes Act of 2021_? It would mean a lot to me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32609435/296311629/-1487944865?refcode=MTH_em_20210718_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTlmMWY0NC0yM2U4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amXybu2BF2k98EaUh3igu_sDWWHrFomzf-9cid3ZAAg=&emci=789f1f44-23e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=799f1f44-23e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32609436/296311630/-1487944865?refcode=MTH_em_20210718_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTlmMWY0NC0yM2U4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amXybu2BF2k98EaUh3igu_sDWWHrFomzf-9cid3ZAAg=&emci=789f1f44-23e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=799f1f44-23e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

Thanks for your support on this.
—Martin

**_\---Begin forwarded email---_**
Here’s the long and short of it, folks:
We’ve got to act boldly on climate right now. It’s the only way to preserve our planet for future generations.
One of the most immediate, actionable ways we can address climate change is by electrifying our households. All of the technology we need to do it already exists.
From heating and cooling to cooking and transportation, our households make up about 42% of our country’s energy-related emissions. But we need to make zero-emission homes—and all the cost savings and health benefits that come with it—accessible to everyone.
That’s why I will be introducing the _Zero-Emission Homes Act of 2021_ to act on climate and put money back in people’s pockets at the same time.
If we pass this legislation, we can give folks rebates for the purchase and installation of zero-emission electric appliances and equipment. We can create millions of good-paying jobs. And we can take a huge step in eliminating carbon pollution from America’s 121 million homes.
[**So, will you sign my petition to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _Zero-Emission Homes Act of 2021_? It would mean a lot for you to call for bold climate action and job creation along with me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32609437/296311631/-1487944865?refcode=MTH_em_20210718_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTlmMWY0NC0yM2U4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amXybu2BF2k98EaUh3igu_sDWWHrFomzf-9cid3ZAAg=&emci=789f1f44-23e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=799f1f44-23e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter,

In just a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.

Ron Johnson has spent the past few months undermining COVID-19 vaccination efforts, calling climate change "bulls---," downplaying the severity of the violent insurrection at our nation's Capitol, and so much more. _The Washington Post_ even gave the guy four pinocchios for his "campaign of vaccine misinformation."

People are fed up with Ron Johnson, and I gotta tell you: I am, too. I'm tired of his conspiracy theories, and I've had enough of the guy turning his back on Wisconsin workers and families. That's why I'm in this fight, and I believe we can beat him.

**_The Cook Political Report_ just moved this race from Lean Republican to Toss-Up, _CNN_ called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent GOP senator up in 2022, and _Inside Elections_ says Wisconsin is already a battleground. Our race is heating up, Peter.**

Now, let's not kid ourselves -- defeating Ron Johnson won't be easy. But I have experience winning tough races. I've won two statewide campaigns in Wisconsin, beating my Republican opponent by more than 100,000 votes in 2018 and even winning back Trump counties! I can take on Ron Johnson and win, but not without your help.

That's why I'm asking:

**[Will you add a donation to support our campaign for U.S. Senate and help us send Ron Johnson packing? Your contribution will immediately be put to use preparing our campaign for the long haul as we work to flip this seat. Anything you can chip in today will go a long way:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32610173/296322424/1714397553?gpsid=50_130_19781&refcode=em21_210718_mm4_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210718_mm4_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWU4YzQ3OC0yOGU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jDvDEbo-Hrm1k7HhiW7kKrapfFM0QUCehLg1ogL8j-Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32610174/296322425/1714397553?gpsid=50_130_19781&refcode=em21_210718_mm4_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210718_mm4_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWU4YzQ3OC0yOGU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jDvDEbo-Hrm1k7HhiW7kKrapfFM0QUCehLg1ogL8j-Y=)
