name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: What the California dream USED to be, Peter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57959074:JN85uzlJN:m:1:3253819041:DB22D23D9E464E1B98267548AF1C8DCB:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57959074:JN85uzlJN:m:1:3253819041:DB22D23D9E464E1B98267548AF1C8DCB:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57959074:JN85uzlJN:m:1:3253819041:DB22D23D9E464E1B98267548AF1C8DCB:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57959074:JN85uzlJN:m:1:3253819041:DB22D23D9E464E1B98267548AF1C8DCB:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57959074:JN85uzlJN:m:1:3253819041:DB22D23D9E464E1B98267548AF1C8DCB:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57959074:JN85uzlJN:m:1:3253819041:DB22D23D9E464E1B98267548AF1C8DCB:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

Friend -- every day, Tom goes to work to advocate for the issues most important to our community. And the House just passed his bill to ensure tribal health centers can receive the health care data to which they are entitled by law.

For too long, tribal nations have faced barriers and challenges to getting health care data, and this bill solidifies their access to it.

Especially in the midst of a public health crisis, access to data and information is critical. The work that Tom is doing in Congress will ensure that tribal nations can easily access the public health data they need to make decisions for their citizens.

Now, Tom is facing a competitive re-election campaign, and it’s going to take grassroots support to keep Tom in Congress working for Arizonans. | Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
---

| | Donald J. Trump
July 17, 2021 Congratulations to Doug Collins on his new book, _The Clock and the Calendar: A Front-Row Look at the Democrats’ Obsession with Donald Trump_. A great look from behind the scenes of someone who was there fighting the good fight—in Impeachment Hoax #1. Thank you Doug, for always being there—and supporting the MAGA Movement!
---
| | Donald J. Trump
July 16, 2021 Fox News and other media outlets incorrectly side with the outdated and terrible Maricopa County Election Board to report no fraud found in the Presidential Election. They spew the gross misinformation purposefully put out by the county and the Associated Press, and IGNORE the very important Arizona Senate’s hearing yesterday, which showed 168,000 fraudulent ballots printed on illegal paper (unofficial ballots), 74,000 mail in ballots received that were never mailed (magically appearing ballots), 11,000 voters were added to the voter rolls AFTER the election and still voted, all the access logs to the machines were wiped, and the election server was hacked during the election. They sided with the County and not the brave Arizona Senate who is fighting for the people of Arizona. The same anchor at the desk the night Fox called Arizona for Joe Biden now wants you to believe there was no fraud. The anchor was Bret Baier. Thankfully, Arizona has strong State Senators willing to fight for the truth. Senator Wendy Rogers says “I have heard enough. It’s time to decertify this election.” Senator Kelly Townsend said the fraud was so bad “I want to see indictments.” Senator Sonny Borrelli says “I've seen enough evidence to challenge the validity of the certification of the Maricopa County Election results.” Arizona shows Fraud and Voting Irregularities many times more than would be needed to change the outcome of the Election.
---
| | Donald J. Trump
July 16, 2021 AP and other media outlets are doing major disinformation to try and discredit the massive number of voter irregularities and fraud found in both Arizona and Georgia. When the real numbers are released people will be shocked, but this is a concerted effort of the Fake News Media to discredit and demean. There has never been anything like it. Numbers will be released shortly, and they are extraordinarily big and highly determinative!
---
| | Donald J. Trump
July 16, 2021 As an answer to the many people asking, I am not on any social media platform in any way, shape, or form, including Parler, GETTR, Gab, etc. When I decide to choose a platform, or build or complete my own, it will be announced. Thank you!
---
|
---
| We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. _We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out._
---
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNUNFuwyAM_Jr0jYhAAvQhD-26_kZEjGnoAokIrOrfj1TdNMky0vk4n8_0DBQDOLieUdZQ2ajSFad1U5-4ULzjqhNn8Uklq1r6cKE2S9CzuaeY_VrD4g9T3yHI45Hzo8XRaGXHRoBQtjNCStECPcz9lNK6VfxUsWupDSFHrItcRLOL7Jj-RqI9Rgea3BcXErE5mKjd5sKNFJJ3KSEWqkc_Ytwmt1b8qv2SQ6r4paMVEzn5waNx2RcEvXbzMNk3vi05AhbcwxB0qTcO2q_a3UKZ_IYw2Lh4kiYkBrcvstjh_9nD7vVt9VdjCQlfNnZiwgHWZ9zKjkPszfpw8-w2IUuEt93TK7eydXb22VfyXDGWszPleUXE-KhAtQxIyRFIyxUQRS0luuGK0aOQY9PuZPZRenqu-PfzLVq_Tt9RefkBcvybnw)
| **Thank you,**

**Donald J. Trump**
45th President of the United States

---
Peter - I wanted to take a couple of minutes of your time to explain why [**your donation of just $5 is so important**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f8c9d2f48fc94902b513acb55235f6b5&_e=gSNuQrDGm_BbghBg7eRX-DC4YIG-ilLlt0V7UsuqyxqGy1rvBUl7Okq1G1CRdowgPFno5sI7iqkl5BEfo5V6uKYzLcrr_xi_uW4DZTtImmponPgbvKK48FUNm7y1-PjTYc6oaeuZsJDGOn0j9OthR-TziWBYWCRCeXwu7PQuXt2EaqV_TepwWFDCZTqH6FGJIhhulHOxK48kpFRM4qs0No6K_346XPRyuY86mkhSpV2WoBp34hQOaClG0xN5g9z56d19K5Pb-IK9Rb3eTswQv-FD8qEU6O2gfcizZsBfXjszMf2Tnrrdc4uEFg3gMWgRzTm-u1DScsK4RAas16n_aSLAiCYXdXTIeLPAMu96uQbAKyrOwlfa3N4Ww_6tfuGU284WiJAflfgOPLClGDge_HWchfkrNdvdBjTspQ5rq5g%3D) in the Special Election for Ohio’s 15th Congressional District.

**As the only Trump endorsed candidate in this race** , the Democrats and the NeverTrump RINOs are going to raise millions to keep us out of the General Election. **I’ll be honest - with just 16 days left in this race we’re being outnumbered.**
